description_long: This is a modern, minimalist wooden chair with a broad, flat seat and a rectangular backrest featuring three horizontal slats. The chair is constructed from light-colored wood with a subtle, natural grain pattern visible across all surfaces. The backrest is thick and solid, providing sturdy support, while the seat is wide and flat, offering ample sitting space. The legs are straight and robust, integrated seamlessly into the seat for a clean, geometric appearance. The overall design is simple yet functional, with no armrests and a focus on straight lines and right angles. The chair's finish is smooth, giving it a contemporary look suitable for urban parks, public spaces, or modern outdoor seating areas.
description: A minimalist wooden chair with a wide flat seat, thick rectangular backrest with three horizontal slats, and straight legs. The light wood grain and smooth finish give it a modern, urban appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick, rectangular backrest and the broad, flat seat with two visible legs.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the three horizontal slats in the backrest and the full width of the back support.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the same thick backrest and flat seat visible.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the open slat design of the backrest and the wide, plain seat surface.
